title: Build a Guest Portal for Your Rental Properties - Advanced Strategies
metaDescription: Learn how to build a guest portal for your rental properties with Base44 - no coding required.
body:

For example, you can create a workflow that automatically assigns tasks to team members based on their availability and skillset, or set up a trigger that sends a notification to clients when a project is nearing completion.
